web.description: This video sucks! but hopefully it can help get to the point of a more perfect install on your first try. This radio is not easy to ...
web.markdown:
![Thumbnail (640x480)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/9GQtDLx1O3Y/sddefault.jpg)
# [2013-2016 Audi A4/S4/Allroad 8.8 Inch Andriod Head Unit Install](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9GQtDLx1O3Y)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [ItsMaxton](https://www.youtube.com/@itsmaxtonvwaudi)
**Uploaded at**: 2024-01-17
**Published at**: 
**Length**: 38:53
**Views**: 79892
**Likes**: 825
**Category**: People & Blogs

## Description

```
This video sucks! but hopefully it can help get to the point of a more perfect install on your first try. This radio is not easy to install... but I belive it to be the best aftermarket radio for the B8/B8.5.

For your AMI adapter, all you need is for the car to be in AUX mode. Most cheap bluetooth adapters do this passivly. If you already have a bluetooth AMI adapter, it should work unplugged from the 5V usb and still put the car in AUX mode. If you're a nerd, you can replace the resistor in the 30pin AMI adapter like I did to convert it to an "aux" cable. 


My unit was from Navifly. I purchased the 6gb 128gb model. 

https://www.aliexpress.us/item/3256805939501512.html?spm=a2g0o.productlist.main.3.318d1a93t4dPlD&algo_pvid=40adda2c-6ab5-47e0-86d7-80537f6bcc45&algo_exp_id=40adda2c-6ab5-47e0-86d7-80537f6bcc45-1&pdp_npi=4%40dis%21USD%21352.51%21176.26%21%21%212521.50%211260.75%21%402101e9d117054548582202659e4f57%2112000035870364062%21sea%21US%212033085916%21&curPageLogUid=QcgVxuyP7IBF&utparam-url=scene%3Asearch%7Cquery_from%3A

Airbag adapter:

https://www.aliexpress.us/item/3256806123071823.html?spm=a2g0o.productlist.main.3.22aa7604vkp0S9&algo_pvid=7a6e8068-082b-40c9-a852-f4b4be7308ae&algo_exp_id=7a6e8068-082b-40c9-a852-f4b4be7308ae-1&pdp_npi=4%40dis%21USD%2110.00%2110.00%21%21%2110.00%2110.00%21%402101e9d217054549469692012e5f59%2112000036706321798%21sea%21US%212033085916%21&curPageLogUid=IGcJ229hMQK2&utparam-url=scene%3Asearch%7Cquery_from%3A

AUX AMI Adapter

https://www.amazon.com/ELONN-Cable-Cellphone-Interface-Adaptor/dp/B077V5D6HM/ref=asc_df_B077V5D6HM/?tag=hyprod-20&linkCode=df0&hvadid=312026001792&hvpos=&hvnetw=g&hvrand=4947648105925795771&hvpone=&hvptwo=&hvqmt=&hvdev=c&hvdvcmdl=&hvlocint=&hvlocphy=1014517&hvtargid=pla-636135617474&psc=1&mcid=f7634ad9e1ef39aaa409ac95de2cff04&gclid=CjwKCAiA75itBhA6EiwAkho9ezFnX7wWwU4fS8Zri_hlduX0pYLJUWkoTegtaoPw_Z6ayhrdtVegRBoC3O0QAvD_BwE
```

so I'm going to have to put some
adhesive on here um so that this all
sits nicely now you may be able to get
away with this without using adhesive if
you're afraid of doing that um may just
be able to kind of Squish it all in um
but personally I'm going to put some uh
glue around here
um and hopefully hopefully it all goes
well and then another thing is this
button is going to have to come out and
I have not figured that out yet but
there's a clip there and a clip there so
I'm probably just going to go at it with
the flathead screwdriver and get this
button out I'm not sure where exactly
I'm going to hide that in the dash yet
um but we'll see so yeah I'm going to
get this all glued up tonight and then
tomorrow I'll get back out there and
I'll wrap this up

# About this item

- 【Compatible Models & Years】Exclusively designed for for Audi A4(B8)(2009-2016),S4(B8)(2009-2016),RS4(B8)(2012-2015) A5(2008-2016),S5(B8)(2008-2016),RS5(2010-2015)--With “Audi multimedia” system only - Left Driving Vehicles.
- 【Big Touch Screen Display】 12.3-inch touch screen, 1920\*720p Resolution. The IPS display delivers outstanding clarity, contrast, and brightness. Catch every single sharp, vivid, and vibrant picture from virtually any vantage point.
- 【Wireless /Wired Car Play & Android Auto】 Use your phone in safety while you drive. by simply saying “Hey Siri” or “OK Google”, to get directions, make calls, send & receive messages, and enjoy your favorite music. Get access to voice commands,Siri & Google Assistant can help you do all of these things. Note: Some smart phone maybe unable to connect wireless Android Auto.
- 【Perfect Integration】Tailor made for BMW vehicles. Not only matching the original dashboard for a perfectly integrated appearance, these units bring the most powerful Wireless CarPlay /Android Auto and touch screen experience to your BMW, making the dash smarter than ever.
- 【Original Functions Retained】Now replacing your car’s screen, and plug into the wiring harness adapter.You have a 12.3 inch touch screen to operate a smart phone link. Works with All Original Functions: MMI System, Original Audi Sound System, Original Radio, CD Player, Bluetooth, Backup Camera Display, Steering Wheel Control Function etc.
- 【1-Year Warranty】 GTRUI backs this item with a 1-year warranty and provides professional technical support. Please contact us via Amazon email, we will reply ASAP!

## Product description

![Integration of CarPlay and Audi A4 A5 B8](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/22a79c62-f11d-4e39-8dc3-a07146263c7a.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Key Features:

- Specially Designed for Audi Vehicles - Dual System, Perfect Integration
- 12.3" High Fidelity IPS Screen, 24:9
- 1920\*720 HD Resolution, IPS Touch Screen
- Supports Full HD 1080P Video Playback
- Supports to High Definition Rear-View with AHD Camera (Not Included)
- Built-in Bluetooth 5.0 - Hands-free Calls, BT Music, Phone Book Sync, Display Call History
- Built-in DSP EQ
- Built-in 2 USB Ports
- Built-in Wireless CarPlay \- Bluetooth Connection
- Built-in Wireless Android Auto \- Bluetooth Connection

![Voice Commands by Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/4ae41acf-d530-4868-aff5-3c28e35636d7.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Applicable Model & Year:

For Audi A4 (B8)(2009-2016), S4(B8)(2009-2016), RS4(B8)(2012-2015) --With “Audi multimedia” system only;

For Audi A5(2008-2016), S5(B8)(2008-2016), RS5(2010-2015) --With “Audi multimedia” system only;

Note: If you Original Audi concert / symphony (Picture blow),this unit can NOT Fit, please buy ASIN：B0DGPZ5FM7

![Compatible with Audi multimedia System](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/692dfc86-3f9b-4ef8-b095-9fbbf901d6ba.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Original Functions Retained:

- \-\- DIY Retrofit Kit Included
- \-\- Steering Wheel Control Retained
- \-\- Amplifier System
- \-\- Original Car Information Display
- \-\- Original Radio/CD Player/Bluetooth/Backup Camera Display

![IPS touch screen CarPlay Android Auto](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/21204fe9-a406-4454-be82-95181a9a2e41.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

Introducing GTRUI' latest car stereos tailor made for Audi vehicles that come with its original OS. Not only matching the original dashboard for a perfectly integrated appearance, the device enables Android Auto & CarPlay & Touch Screen experience in your Audi, making the dash smarter than ever. Now without uninstalling your CD player, radio or MII control, you can swipe the screen and enter the new phone link communication and entertainment.

![Amplifier System](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/2dedc93b-1ef1-4f75-a3fc-a37fff733726.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Amplifier System

Retains original 3D Sound System.

![Steering Wheel Control](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/04e5a04e-b52a-4f70-99ff-1c4f3cf6767d.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Steering Wheel Control

Easily control your music track from your phone, answer calls, or switch sources the power is at your fingers while your eyes are on the road.

![MMI Control Retained](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/190cd222-d9df-4242-80ca-9d9c12251b72.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### MMI Control Retained

Retains the Mll control to allow ease of access to full range of functions and navigation (MMl controller is supported in original system only ).

![Backup Camera Display](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/116bbddd-12bc-4ffe-bc37-aab628ada53f.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Backup Camera Display

The OEM factory cameras, parking radar sensors, and dynamic trajectory parking lines are all supported and displayed on the large touchscreen. If you do not have the OEM camera you can add and install an aftermarket AHD 720P backup camera. When you put your car into reverse the backup camera will automatically be displayed on the screen.

![Original Bluetooth Retained](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/90c035bf-edfc-42f6-b413-258e7ebe47be.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Original Bluetooth Retained

![Original CD Player Retained](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/f337f5df-2a33-4b18-8720-275776cb63d9.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Original CD Player Retained

Now without uninstalling your CD player. Keep the fun of CD music disks.

# Car stereo. Complete swap with aftermarket headunit. Anyone?

- _Thread starter_ Thread starter [jalex](https://www.audizine.com/members/jalex.364262/)
- _Start date_ Start date [Nov 10, 2015](https://www.audizine.com/threads/car-stereo-complete-swap-with-aftermarket-headunit-anyone.676972/)

#### [jalex](https://www.audizine.com/members/jalex.364262/)

##### Junior Member

[J](https://www.audizine.com/members/jalex.364262/)

JoinedNov 10, 2015Location[San Diego](https://www.audizine.com/misc/location-info?location=San+Diego)

I've searched and searched and cannot come across someone who has replaced the factory stereo with an aftermarket one.

I'm not happy with the current system on my '09 A4 with the symphony set-up.

I want so much more out of my stereo (better eq control, bluetooth streaming, screen mirroring, sub control, signal delay, etc etc)

I cannot seem to find an interface that will allow me to swap out the stereo and still retain Climate Control, Exterior Lighting control, steering wheel control, time and date, etc.

I came across this and I was hoping that someone has tried this before or at least would now right off the bat if it'll work

Its and interface from Scosche: DDR-VW01

Its for volkswagen that retains those functions i mentioned. But maybe it'll work for Audi? I know that might be very hopeful.

Anyways, this is my first post! Thank you.

>
> That is pretty bad ass... But is it available in the US?
>
>
> Click to expand...

It is not available anywhere yet. Its been in development for a number of years. When I first got the A4 that was the first thing I looked for based on my previous audio endeavors. I actually stumbled across that Alpine unit and made note to check back a few years later and it is still in the same It is virtually impossible to get everything you'll want out of the stock system. You may have luck with a sound processor that you can connect to a factory HU. It would take a significant amount of work. A secondary option... albeit not pretty and not including all the options you are referring to, but you could relocate an HU to the glove box and run everything off that.

Long story short, I think that Alpine unit is a ways off. If it does come out, sign me up but it will likely cost like $3,000 or more so I'm probably going to be passing over that one.
